nasb.text: that Your eyes may be open to the supplication of Your servant and to the supplication of Your people Israel, to listen to them whenever they call to You.

esv.text: Let your eyes be open to the plea of your servant and to the plea of your people Israel, giving ear to them whenever they call to you.

cnv.text: 願你睜開眼睛看顧你僕人的祈求，和你的子民以色列的祈求，他們向你呼求的，願你都垂聽。

ccb.text: “愿你垂顾仆人和你的以色列子民的祈求。无论他们什么时候向你祈求，都求你垂听。
